subject: Upgrades to the K3 server?
body:
We have 2 K3 computers. due to slight age difference, they came with 
different processing GPUs:  Quadro GP100 (16GB) and P6000 (24GB). 
Unfortunately, GP100 is on the Krios system. I also found out that there 
are empty PCIe slots in the system. Has anyone attempted 1) an upgrade to 
the GPUs and 2) adding another GPU to their K3 machine?
